stemHtml: Which of the following is correct regarding mountain waves?

options.a: Mountain waves can be shallow, but can still produce severe turbulence and downdrafts which can exceed the performance capability of an aircraft.
options.b: Severe turbulence is most often found in the area upwind of the mountain range.
options.c: The presence of smooth outlined clouds suggests that there won't be any turbulence or downdrafts.
options.d: The airflow in a mountain-wave system is often smooth but vertical currents can be strong enough to exceed the performance capability of an aircraft.
